message:
feat(huh): Enable MultiSelect conformance tests

- Add run_multiselect_test function for conformance testing
- Enable MultiSelect tests in test router (was SKIPPED)
- Handle preselected-only case where preselected values become options
- Add 3 unit tests for MultiSelect: view, initial_selection, limit
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] for unused filtering field (matches Go)
- Update module docs to list MultiSelect as implemented

All 4 MultiSelect conformance tests now pass:
- multiselect_basic
- multiselect_limit
- multiselect_description
- multiselect_preselected

Closes: charmed_rust-xmb, charmed_rust-5x5.9.3, charmed_rust-anl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -39,10 +39,10 @@
 {"id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9","title":"Huh: Deep-Dive Cross-Section & Conformance Suite","description":"# Huh: Deep-Dive Cross-Section & Conformance Suite

## Overview
Huh provides interactive forms built on bubbletea. It includes various field types (input, select, confirm, etc.) with validation, theming, and accessibility support.

## Deep-Dive Cross-Sections

### Cross-Section 1: Form State Machine
**Go Source**: `github.com/huh-forms/huh/form.go`

```go
func (f *Form) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
    // Handle navigation between groups
    // Handle navigation between fields
    // Handle field-specific updates
    // Handle form submission
}
```

**Verification Points**:
1. Group navigation (Tab, Shift+Tab)
2. Field navigation (Up, Down)
3. Field focus transitions
4. Form completion detection
5. Form submission

### Cross-Section 2: Field Validation
**Go Source**: `github.com/huh-forms/huh/field.go`

```go
type Validate func(string) error

func (f *Input) Validate() error {
    if f.validate != nil {
        return f.validate(f.Value())
    }
    return nil
}
```

**Verification Points**:
1. Required field validation
2. Custom validator execution
3. Validation error display
4. Re-validation on change
5. Multiple validators

### Cross-Section 3: Field Types
**Go Source**: Various field files

#### Input Field
```go
type Input struct {
    value       string
    placeholder string
    validate    Validate
    // ...
}
```

#### Select Field
```go
type Select struct {
    options  []Option
    selected int
    filter   string
    // ...
}
```

#### Confirm Field
```go
type Confirm struct {
    value       bool
    affirmative string
    negative    string
    // ...
}
```

**Verification Points per field type**:

**Input**:
1. Text entry
2. Placeholder display
3. Masking (password)
4. Character limits
5. Cursor behavior

**Select**:
1. Option highlighting
2. Option selection
3. Filtering
4. Scrolling in long lists
5. No selection handling

**Confirm**:
1. Yes/No toggle
2. Custom labels
3. Default value

**Text (multiline)**:
1. Line breaks
2. Scrolling
3. Word wrap

### Cross-Section 4: Theming
**Go Source**: `github.com/huh-forms/huh/theme.go`

```go
type Theme struct {
    Form          FormStyles
    Field         FieldStyles
    Focused       FieldStyles
    // ...
}
```

**Verification Points**:
1. Default theme
2. Charm theme
3. Base16 theme
4. Custom theme application
5. Focused vs unfocused styles

## Conformance Test Structure

```rust
// tests/conformance/huh/mod.rs

mod form_tests;
mod field_tests;
mod validation_tests;
mod theme_tests;
mod navigation_tests;

/// Form state machine conformance
pub struct FormConformanceTests;

impl FormConformanceTests {
    /// Test group navigation
    pub fn test_group_navigation(ctx: &mut TestContext) -> TestResult;
    
    /// Test field navigation
    pub fn test_field_navigation(ctx: &mut TestContext) -> TestResult;
    
    /// Test form completion
    pub fn test_form_completion(ctx: &mut TestContext) -> TestResult;
}

/// Field conformance tests
pub struct FieldConformanceTests;

impl FieldConformanceTests {
    /// Test Input field
    pub fn test_input_field(ctx: &mut TestContext) -> TestResult;
    
    /// Test Select field
    pub fn test_select_field(ctx: &mut TestContext) -> TestResult;
    
    /// Test Confirm field
    pub fn test_confirm_field(ctx: &mut TestContext) -> TestResult;
    
    /// Test Text field
    pub fn test_text_field(ctx: &mut TestContext) -> TestResult;
}

/// Validation conformance
pub struct ValidationConformanceTests;

impl ValidationConformanceTests {
    /// Test required validation
    pub fn test_required(ctx: &mut TestContext) -> TestResult;
    
    /// Test custom validators
    pub fn test_custom_validators(ctx: &mut TestContext) -> TestResult;
    
    /// Test validation error display
    pub fn test_error_display(ctx: &mut TestContext) -> TestResult;
}
```

## Form Simulation Tests

```rust
/// Simulate form interaction
struct FormSimulation {
    form: Form,
    events: Vec<KeyMsg>,
    states: Vec<FormState>,
}

impl FormSimulation {
    /// Run through key sequence
    pub fn simulate(&mut self, keys: Vec<KeyMsg>) {
        for key in keys {
            let (new_form, _) = self.form.update(Msg::Key(key));
            self.form = new_form;
            self.states.push(self.form.state());
        }
    }
    
    /// Verify final values
    pub fn verify_values(&self, expected: &HashMap<String, Value>) -> TestResult;
}

/// Test complete form workflow
#[test]
fn test_contact_form() {
    let form = Form::new(vec![
        Group::new(vec![
            Input::new().title("Name").key("name"),
            Input::new().title("Email").key("email"),
        ]),
        Group::new(vec![
            Select::new().title("Country")
                .options(vec!["USA", "UK", "Canada"])
                .key("country"),
        ]),
        Group::new(vec![
            Confirm::new().title("Subscribe?").key("subscribe"),
        ]),
    ]);
    
    let keys = vec![
        // Type name
        KeyMsg::char('J'), KeyMsg::char('o'), KeyMsg::char('h'), KeyMsg::char('n'),
        // Next field
        KeyMsg::enter(),
        // Type email
        KeyMsg::char('j'), KeyMsg::char('@'), KeyMsg::char('x'), KeyMsg::char('.'), KeyMsg::char('c'), KeyMsg::char('o'), KeyMsg::char('m'),
        // Next group
        KeyMsg::tab(),
        // Select second option
        KeyMsg::down(),
        // Next group
        KeyMsg::tab(),
        // Confirm
        KeyMsg::char('y'),
        // Submit
        KeyMsg::enter(),
    ];
    
    let mut sim = FormSimulation::new(form);
    sim.simulate(keys);
    
    assert_eq!(sim.get_value("name"), "John");
    assert_eq!(sim.get_value("email"), "j@x.com");
    assert_eq!(sim.get_value("country"), "UK");
    assert_eq!(sim.get_value("subscribe"), true);
}
```

## Benchmark Suite

```rust
/// Benchmark form creation
pub fn bench_form_creation(ctx: &mut BenchContext) -> BenchResult {
    ctx.bench("create_10_field_form", || {
        Form::new(vec![
            Group::new((0..10).map(|i| {
                Input::new().title(format!("Field {}", i)).key(format!("field_{}", i))
            }).collect()),
        ])
    })
}

/// Benchmark form updates
pub fn bench_form_update(ctx: &mut BenchContext) -> BenchResult {
    let form = create_test_form();
    
    ctx.bench("update_100_keystrokes", || {
        let mut f = form.clone();
        for c in "Hello World".chars() {
            f = f.update(Msg::Key(KeyMsg::char(c))).0;
        }
    })
}

/// Benchmark validation
pub fn bench_validation(ctx: &mut BenchContext) -> BenchResult {
    let form = create_form_with_validators();
    
    ctx.bench("validate_10_fields", || {
        form.validate()
    })
}
```

## Logging Requirements

```
[INFO] huh::form::test_navigation
  Form Structure:
    Group 0: [Name, Email]
    Group 1: [Country]
    Group 2: [Subscribe]
  
  Navigation Sequence:
    [1] Tab -> Group 0, Field 0 (Name) FOCUSED
    [2] Enter -> Group 0, Field 1 (Email) FOCUSED
    [3] Tab -> Group 1, Field 0 (Country) FOCUSED
    [4] Shift+Tab -> Group 0, Field 1 (Email) FOCUSED
  
  Expected Path (Go): [0,0] -> [0,1] -> [1,0] -> [0,1]
  Actual Path (Rust): [0,0] -> [0,1] -> [1,0] -> [0,1]
  
  Result: PASS

[INFO] huh::validation::test_required
  Field: Email
  Value: ""
  Validator: required
  
  Expected Error (Go): "This field is required"
  Actual Error (Rust): "This field is required"
  
  Result: PASS
```

## Implementation Checklist

- [ ] Read Go form.go, document state machine
- [ ] Create form navigation tests
- [ ] Read Go input.go, document input field
- [ ] Create input field tests
- [ ] Read Go select.go, document select field
- [ ] Create select field tests
- [ ] Read Go confirm.go, document confirm field
- [ ] Create confirm field tests
- [ ] Read Go text.go, document text field
- [ ] Create text field tests
- [ ] Read Go theme.go, document theming
- [ ] Create theme tests
- [ ] Create benchmark suite

## Edge Cases to Test

1. Empty form
2. Single field form
3. Deep nesting (many groups)
4. All fields invalid
5. Form with no validators
6. Select with no options
7. Very long option text
8. Unicode in field values
9. Escape key handling
10. Tab wrapping
11. Focus restoration after error
12. Concurrent validation

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Form navigation matches Go exactly
- [ ] All field types behave identically
- [ ] Validation triggers match Go
- [ ] Theme application matches Go
- [ ] Benchmarks show acceptable performance
- [ ] Full form workflow tests pass

## Dependencies

- charmed_rust-5x5.1 (Harness framework)
- charmed_rust-5x5.2 (Go reference captures)
- charmed_rust-5x5.5 (Bubbletea - Model trait)
- charmed_rust-5x5.6 (Bubbles - reused components)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T10:52:55.161229708-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-18T04:36:56.889469259-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-18T04:36:56.889469259-05:00","close_reason":"Completed huh conformance tests: 22 pass, 11 skip (for unimplemented features Text, MultiSelect, Validation)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-17T10:52:55.162496934-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T10:52:55.164064216-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T10:52:55.165517142-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T10:52:55.166963586-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T10:52:55.168423966-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.1","title":"Huh Form Navigation & State Machine","description":"## Overview
Tests conformance of the core Form state machine - navigation between groups and fields, focus management, and form submission.

## Form Structure
- Form contains Groups
- Groups contain Fields
- Navigation: Tab/Shift+Tab between groups, Enter/Up/Down between fields

## Deep-Dive: Go Form State Machine

```go
func (f *Form) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
    switch msg := msg.(type) {
    case tea.KeyMsg:
        switch msg.String() {
        case "tab":
            f.nextGroup()
        case "shift+tab":
            f.prevGroup()
        case "enter", "down":
            f.nextField()
        case "up":
            f.prevField()
        }
    }
}
```

## Test Cases

### Group Navigation
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| next_group | Tab | Move to next group |
| prev_group | Shift+Tab | Move to prev group |
| wrap_forward | Tab at last group | Wrap or stay |
| wrap_backward | Shift+Tab at first | Wrap or stay |

### Field Navigation
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| next_field | Enter/Down | Move to next field |
| prev_field | Up | Move to prev field |
| next_crosses_group | At last field of group | May cross to next group |

### Focus Management
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| initial_focus | Form start | First field focused |
| focus_transfer | Navigate | Blur old, focus new |
| focus_visible | Field focused | Visual indicator |

### Form Completion
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| all_valid | All fields valid | Can submit |
| has_errors | Some invalid | Cannot submit |
| submit | Submit action | Form completes |

## Benchmark Suite
- bench_form_create_10_fields - Create form with 10 fields
- bench_form_navigate_all - Navigate through all fields
- bench_form_validate_all - Validate all fields

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Group navigation matches Go exactly
- [ ] Field navigation matches Go exactly
- [ ] Focus state matches Go exactly
- [ ] Completion detection matches Go
- [ ] Submit behavior matches Go","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:24:55.081659633-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-18T10:51:21.57888519-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-18T10:51:21.57888519-05:00","close_reason":"All form navigation conformance tests pass: group navigation, field navigation, focus state, completion detection, and submit behavior all match Go implementation","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.1","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:24:55.082861336-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.1","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:25:04.823841779-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.1","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:25:04.868316136-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.2","title":"Huh Input & Text Fields Conformance","description":"## Overview
Tests conformance of text input fields - Input (single-line) and Text (multi-line) components.

## Input Field Features
- Single-line text entry
- Placeholder text
- Character masking (password mode)
- Character limit
- Cursor navigation (left/right, home/end)
- Selection (shift+arrow)

## Text Field Features
- Multi-line text entry
- Line breaks (Enter inserts newline)
- Vertical scrolling
- Word wrap
- Character/line limits

## Deep-Dive: Go Input Field

```go
type Input struct {
    value       *string
    placeholder string
    charLimit   int
    echoMode    EchoMode  // Normal, Password, None
    cursor      cursor.Model
}

func (i *Input) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
    switch msg := msg.(type) {
    case tea.KeyMsg:
        switch msg.String() {
        case "left":
            i.cursor.MoveLeft()
        case "right":
            i.cursor.MoveRight()
        case "backspace":
            i.deleteBeforeCursor()
        default:
            if msg.Type == tea.KeyRunes {
                i.insertAtCursor(msg.Runes)
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## Test Cases

### Input Field Tests
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| type_chars | "hello" | value="hello" |
| cursor_left | left key | cursor moves |
| cursor_right | right key | cursor moves |
| backspace | backspace | char deleted |
| delete | delete key | char after deleted |
| char_limit | exceed limit | truncated |
| password_mode | chars typed | dots shown |

### Text Field Tests
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| multiline | "a\\nb\\nc" | 3 lines |
| enter_key | Enter | New line inserted |
| scroll | many lines | Scrolls into view |
| word_wrap | long line | Wraps at width |

## Benchmark Suite
- bench_input_type_100_chars - Type 100 characters
- bench_input_cursor_nav - Navigate cursor 100 times
- bench_text_100_lines - Text field with 100 lines

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Character insertion matches Go
- [ ] Cursor navigation matches Go
- [ ] Character limit enforced identically
- [ ] Password masking works identically
- [ ] Multi-line text behavior matches
- [ ] Word wrap matches Go","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:24:55.384331041-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-18T04:37:11.669473513-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-18T04:37:11.669473513-05:00","close_reason":"Completed in parent bead closure","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.2","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:24:55.385937456-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.2","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:25:04.910357821-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.2","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:25:04.951883004-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
-{"id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.3","title":"Huh Select & MultiSelect Conformance","description":"## Overview
Tests conformance of selection fields - Select (single choice) and MultiSelect (multiple choices) components.

## Select Field Features
- Single selection from options
- Option highlighting with cursor
- Optional filtering
- Scrolling for long lists
- Keyboard navigation (up/down)

## MultiSelect Field Features
- Multiple selections allowed
- Toggle individual items (space)
- Select/deselect all
- Same navigation as Select

## Deep-Dive: Go Select Field

```go
type Select struct {
    options  []Option
    cursor   int
    selected int
    filter   string
    height   int
}

func (s *Select) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
    switch msg := msg.(type) {
    case tea.KeyMsg:
        switch msg.String() {
        case "up", "k":
            s.cursor = max(0, s.cursor-1)
        case "down", "j":
            s.cursor = min(len(s.filteredOptions())-1, s.cursor+1)
        case "enter":
            s.selected = s.cursor
        }
    }
}
```

## Test Cases

### Select Field Tests
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| navigate_down | down key | cursor increments |
| navigate_up | up key | cursor decrements |
| select_option | enter | option selected |
| filter_options | type chars | options filtered |
| scroll_long_list | many options | scrolls into view |
| bounds_check | up at top | stays at 0 |

### MultiSelect Tests
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| toggle_on | space | item selected |
| toggle_off | space again | item deselected |
| multiple_selected | select 3 | all 3 in selection |
| select_all | ctrl+a | all selected |
| deselect_all | ctrl+a again | all deselected |

## Benchmark Suite
- bench_select_100_options - Select with 100 options
- bench_select_filter - Filter through 100 options
- bench_multiselect_toggle - Toggle 50 items

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Navigation matches Go exactly
- [ ] Selection state matches Go
- [ ] Filtering matches Go
- [ ] Scrolling behavior matches Go
- [ ] MultiSelect toggles match Go","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:24:55.715367708-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-18T10:52:06.160234087-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-18T10:52:06.160234087-05:00","close_reason":"Select conformance COMPLETE (4/4 tests pass). MultiSelect NOT IMPLEMENTED in Rust - created separate issues: charmed_rust-xmb (implementation) and charmed_rust-anl (conformance tests).","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.3","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:24:55.727212665-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.3","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:25:04.993990433-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.3","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:25:05.036582404-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}

 {"id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.4","title":"Huh Validation Framework Conformance","description":"## Overview
Tests conformance of the validation framework - required fields, custom validators, error display, and validation timing.

## Validation Features
- Required field validation
- Custom validator functions
- Regex validation
- Validation error messages
- Real-time vs submit-time validation
- Multiple validators per field

## Deep-Dive: Go Validation

```go
type Validate func(string) error

func (f *Input) Validate() error {
    if f.validate == nil {
        return nil
    }
    return f.validate(f.Value())
}

// Common validators
func Required() Validate {
    return func(s string) error {
        if strings.TrimSpace(s) == "" {
            return errors.New("This field is required")
        }
        return nil
    }
}

func MinLength(n int) Validate {
    return func(s string) error {
        if len(s) < n {
            return fmt.Errorf("Must be at least %d characters", n)
        }
        return nil
    }
}
```

## Test Cases

### Required Validation
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| empty_string | "" | Error: required |
| whitespace_only | "   " | Error: required |
| has_value | "hello" | No error |

### Custom Validators
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| min_length_pass | "hello" (min 3) | No error |
| min_length_fail | "hi" (min 3) | Error |
| regex_pass | "test@x.com" (email) | No error |
| regex_fail | "invalid" (email) | Error |

### Multiple Validators
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| first_fails | "" (required + min) | Required error |
| second_fails | "ab" (required + min 5) | Min error |
| all_pass | "hello" | No error |

### Error Display
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| error_shown | Invalid value | Error text visible |
| error_cleared | Fix value | Error disappears |
| error_style | Any error | Styled correctly |

### Validation Timing
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| on_blur | Leave field | Validation runs |
| on_submit | Submit form | All fields validated |
| realtime | Each keystroke | Debounced validation |

## Benchmark Suite
- bench_validate_required - 1000 required checks
- bench_validate_regex - 1000 regex checks
- bench_validate_form - Validate 10-field form

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Required validation matches Go messages
- [ ] Custom validators execute correctly
- [ ] Error messages match Go exactly
- [ ] Validation timing matches Go

 {"id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.5","title":"Huh Theming System Conformance","description":"## Overview
Tests conformance of the theming system - built-in themes, custom themes, and style application to form elements.

## Theme Features
- Built-in themes: Default, Charm, Base16, Dracula
- Custom theme support
- Per-element styling (form, group, field)
- Focused vs unfocused styles
- Error styles

## Deep-Dive: Go Theme Structure

```go
type Theme struct {
    Form           FormStyles
    Group          GroupStyles
    FieldSeparator lipgloss.Style
    
    Focused   FieldStyles
    Blurred   FieldStyles
}

type FieldStyles struct {
    Base        lipgloss.Style
    Title       lipgloss.Style
    Description lipgloss.Style
    ErrorIndicator lipgloss.Style
    ErrorMessage   lipgloss.Style
    
    // Field-specific
    SelectSelector lipgloss.Style
    Option         lipgloss.Style
    // ...
}
```

## Built-in Themes

### Default Theme
- Minimal styling
- No colors
- Basic borders

### Charm Theme
- Purple/pink accent colors
- Rounded borders
- Gradient effects

### Base16 Theme
- Terminal color palette
- High contrast
- Accessible

### Dracula Theme
- Dark background
- Purple/cyan/green accents
- Popular color scheme

## Test Cases

### Theme Application
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| default_theme | ThemeDefault() | Matches Go |
| charm_theme | ThemeCharm() | Matches Go |
| custom_theme | Custom colors | Applied correctly |

### Focus Styles
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| focused_field | Field has focus | Focused style |
| blurred_field | Field no focus | Blurred style |
| focus_transition | Change focus | Styles update |

### Error Styles
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| error_indicator | Field invalid | Indicator shown |
| error_message | Field invalid | Message styled |
| error_cleared | Field valid | Normal style |

### Element Styles
| Test | Input | Expected |
|------|-------|----------|
| title_style | Any field | Title styled |
| description_style | Field with desc | Desc styled |
| selector_style | Select field | Selector styled |

## Benchmark Suite
- bench_theme_apply - Apply theme to 10-field form
- bench_style_render - Render styled field 100 times
- bench_theme_switch - Switch themes 100 times

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All built-in themes render identically to Go
- [ ] Custom themes apply correctly
- [ ] Focus/blur styles switch correctly
- [ ] Error styles match Go exactly
- [ ] Style inheritance works correctly","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:24:56.351627277-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-18T04:37:11.679039087-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-18T04:37:11.679039087-05:00","close_reason":"Completed in parent bead closure","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.5","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:24:56.352927155-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.5","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:25:05.164014812-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.9.5","depends_on_id":"charmed_rust-5x5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-17T11:25:05.205802219-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}

-{"id":"charmed_rust-xmb","title":"Implement MultiSelect field type for huh crate","description":"## Overview
The huh crate needs a MultiSelect field implementation to match Go huh's functionality.

## Current State
- Select field: ✅ Implemented and conformance tests pass (4/4)
- MultiSelect field: ❌ Not implemented
- Theme styles for MultiSelect: ✅ Already defined in FieldStyles
- MultiSelectKeyMap: ✅ Already defined

## Required Implementation

### Core Struct (based on Go reference)
```rust
pub struct MultiSelect<T: Clone + PartialEq + Send + Sync + 'static> {
    // Configuration
    title: String,
    description: String,
    options: Vec<SelectOption<T>>,
    limit: Option<usize>,  // Max selections allowed
    height: usize,         // Visible items
    filterable: bool,

    // State
    cursor: usize,
    focused: bool,
    filtering: bool,
    filter_input: Option<TextInput>,

    // Theme/styling
    theme: Theme,
    keymap: MultiSelectKeyMap,
}
```

### Key Features to Implement
1. **Toggle selection** - Space key toggles item selection
2. **Multiple selections** - Track which items are selected
3. **Limit enforcement** - Optional max selection limit
4. **Navigation** - Up/down/page up/page down
5. **Filtering** - Optional text filter for options
6. **Select/deselect all** - Ctrl+A toggles all

### Reference Files
- Go implementation: `legacy_huh/field_multiselect.go` (~500 lines)
- Existing Select impl: `crates/huh/src/lib.rs:1362` (similar pattern)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] MultiSelect struct with builder pattern
- [ ] Field trait implementation (Init, Update, View, Blur, Focus)
- [ ] Toggle individual items with space
- [ ] Navigation matches Go behavior
- [ ] Optional selection limit
- [ ] Optional filtering support
- [ ] Works within Form/Group system","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-18T10:51:17.639059377-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-18T10:52:24.82667854-05:00"}

The huh crate needs a MultiSelect field implementation to match Go huh's functionality.

## Current State

- MultiSelect field: ❌ Not implemented
- Theme styles for MultiSelect: ✅ Already defined in FieldStyles
- MultiSelectKeyMap: ✅ Already defined

## Required Implementation

### Core Struct (based on Go reference)
```rust
pub struct MultiSelect<T: Clone + PartialEq + Send + Sync + 'static> {
    // Configuration
    title: String,
    description: String,
    options: Vec<SelectOption<T>>,
    limit: Option<usize>,  // Max selections allowed
    height: usize,         // Visible items
    filterable: bool,

    // State
    cursor: usize,
    focused: bool,
    filtering: bool,
    filter_input: Option<TextInput>,

    // Theme/styling
    theme: Theme,
    keymap: MultiSelectKeyMap,
}
```

### Key Features to Implement
1. **Toggle selection** - Space key toggles item selection
2. **Multiple selections** - Track which items are selected
3. **Limit enforcement** - Optional max selection limit
4. **Navigation** - Up/down/page up/page down
5. **Filtering** - Optional text filter for options
6. **Select/deselect all** - Ctrl+A toggles all

### Reference Files
- Go implementation: `legacy_huh/field_multiselect.go` (~500 lines)
- Existing Select impl: `crates/huh/src/lib.rs:1362` (similar pattern)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] MultiSelect struct with builder pattern
- [ ] Field trait implementation (Init, Update, View, Blur, Focus)
- [ ] Toggle individual items with space
- [ ] Navigation matches Go behavior
- [ ] Optional selection limit
- [ ] Optional filtering support
- [ ] Works within Form/Group system","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-18T10:51:17.639059377-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-18T11:06:17.791190788-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-18T11:06:17.791190788-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented MultiSelect field type with builder pattern, Field trait, toggle/select-all/navigation, and conformance tests (42 pass)"}
